title: feat: add opposite prompt Discord bot
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Prompting in reverse
gist.blurb: Someone built a Discord bot that takes your image prompt, completely inverts the meaning, and generates that instead. Chaos? Yes. Art? Also yes.
gist.summary: Added a new community Discord bot that chains the Pollinations text and image APIs to generate the exact opposite of a user's prompt.
gist.impact: Developers can deploy this bot to their servers for a fun, chaotic image generation experience, serving as a great reference for chaining our APIs.
gist.visual_concept: The concept is 'opposites' and 'Discord bots'. The scene should feature the Pollinations bee and the Monitor Robot (representing the bot). The robot's screen should show something, while a canvas or output shows the exact opposite (e.g., fire vs water, or day vs night).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, standing next to a chunky monitor-head robot. The robot's screen shows a bright sun, while a canvas next to them displays a glowing moon, representing opposite prompts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, standing next to a chunky monitor-head robot. The robot's screen shows a bright sun, while a canvas next to them displays a glowing moon, representing opposite prompts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
